stemHtml: If it becomes evident that a controlled VFR flight cannot be continued in VMC, according with the provisions of ICAO Annex 2, Rules of the Air, it shall…

options.a: continue to operate in IMC and inform the appropriate ATC unit of the action being taken either to leave the airspace concerned or to land at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.b: continue to operate in VMC and inform the appropriate ATC unit after landing.
options.c: request authorisation to operate as a special VFR flight, if the flight is operated within a control zone.
options.d: continue the flight in VMC as far as practicable and land at the nearest airport.
